backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no logic implemented.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping requested features to affected files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing autogenerated summaries of many frontend components and content modules.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base file defining theme variables, dark mode overrides, and global styles.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML document providing the mount point and loading the React application entry script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component handling hash-based routing and rendering either the homepage sections or dedicated feature pages.
frontend/src/components/audio/Background: Background audio controller that auto‑plays chainsaw or fallback clown audio with gesture‑based retry logic.
frontend/src/components/layout/Section.t: Reusable layout wrapper that renders section titles, optional subtitles, icons, separators, and content spacing.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Footer displaying an extreme haunt warning and attribution section with styled icons and text.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Responsive header with scroll effects, navigation links, and mobile menu toggle including smooth section scrolling.
frontend/src/components/sections/auditio: Lists audition perks as a grid of cards with icons, titles, and short descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Auditio: Auditions info section with dates, perks, and a list of roles, some with detailed descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/ClownTo: Section showing an interior elevation image of Clown Town with descriptive text about the attraction.
frontend/src/components/sections/FoodBoo: Displays food booth cards with pricing alerts, images, descriptions, menus, and navigation for specific booths.
frontend/src/components/sections/Haunted: Grid of haunted house attraction cards with images, descriptions, scenes, and wait time info.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeHer: Full-screen hero section with background, logo, tagline, and button to scroll to auditions.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomePro: Section highlighting the 6pm procession with an image and descriptive overview.
frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLoc: Displays operating hours, ticket types, and rules using styled cards and alerts in an info section.
frontend/src/components/sections/MerchSh: Renders a merch shops grid with shop details and prices plus a footer note card.
frontend/src/components/sections/ScareZo: Shows scare zone cards with images, descriptions, and a special button for the Laser Hell zone.
frontend/src/components/sections/Schoolh: Presents a preview card for the Schoolhouse attraction with image, teaser text, and a link to full details.
frontend/src/components/sections/Teaser2: Introduces two upcoming 2027 haunted houses with themed teaser cards.
frontend/src/components/sections/TeaserS: Displays a simple teaser card announcing future updates.
frontend/src/components/theme/HorrorBack: Provides layered fixed-position background effects including images, gradients, noise, and scanlines.
frontend/src/content/foodBooths.ts: Defines structured data for multiple themed food booths including names, taglines, descriptions, and menus.
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts: Defines mappings from content item names to their corresponding generated image asset paths.
frontend/src/content/hauntedHouses.ts: Provides haunted house metadata including names, taglines, descriptions, scenes, and location info.
frontend/src/content/merchShops.ts: Lists merchandise shops with names, available items, and prices.
frontend/src/content/scareZones.ts: Defines scare zone data including names, taglines, descriptions, and optional location info.
frontend/src/content/schoolhouseSneakPee: Contains title, subtitle, description, and image path for the Schoolhouse sneak peek feature.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity authentication state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity context and provider for authentication handling and identity state management.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining theme variables and custom horror‑themed styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Root entry file that initializes React, query client, and Internet Identity provider.
frontend/src/pages/LaserHellPage.tsx: Page component rendering detailed Laser Hell scare zone content with image, metadata, and back navigation.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolhouseSneakPeekP: Page component showing the Schoolhouse sneak peek image and description with navigation back to home.
frontend/src/pages/SharksHellPage.tsx: Renders the Sharks Hell food booth page, displaying its image, description, and menu with a back button that scrolls to the food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/SliderDoomPage.tsx: Renders the Slider Doom food booth page, showing booth details, image, and menu with a back button returning to the food booths section.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures TailwindCSS with custom colors, radii, shadows, animations, and plugin integrations for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, requirements, features, and image needs for a haunted attraction website build.
